description.p1: My name is Kévin DUFAUT and I am currently a first-year Master's student in Computer Science at the Grenoble Alpes University (UGA).
description.p2: Passionate about everything related directly or indirectly to computer science for years, I am training myself through personal self-taught projects, as well as through the courses taken during my university studies.
description.p3: At the end of this Master's degree, I wish to join a company specialized in cybersecurity, software development, or hardware design.
description.p4: Today, any opportunity allowing me to acquire new skills and enrich my experience in these fields that I am passionate about represents a real chance to progress and move closer to my professional goals.
